name: TeamMCP
description: Self-hostable MCP gateway with per-member AI tool access control

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: 256-bit key for encrypting connector credentials. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

AUTH_SECRET.description: Secret for signing session tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for AI-powered permission filtering (optional)

MCP_PORT.description: Internal port for the MCP SSE server
